title: Mr. Hurt
original_title: มิสเตอร์เฮิร์ท มือวางอันดับเจ็บ
overview: Don Sri-Chang, a tennis professional and world champion, is left heartbroken when his girlfriend turns down his marriage proposal and dates a rockstar. Dew, his long-lost friend, turns up out of nowhere to help him with the heartbreak.
